1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: select buildings in Kristiansand (by kommunenummer) with geometry and bygningid

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) reduced to municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood zone polygons (flomareal) reduced to municipality extent

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons (intersection) using building geometry and stormflo geometry

6.description: from buildings that intersect storm-surge, find those that also intersect flood zones (intersection) using building geometry and flomareal geometry

7.description: collapse to unique buildings (one row per bygningid)

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).
